description: Regression fixture for locate_isomorphs()/evaluate_isomorph(), derived from D:\Private\Dev\MVS\Repositories\crypto\Crypt\CT\RED-MACHINE-1.CT. That file actually contains three separate ciphertexts (blank-line separated), which must be matched self+cross against each other (3 messages -> 6 pairs: 3 self-search, 3 cross-search). Note: the original C++ IsomorphAlgorithm regression fixture (regression-data/regression.red-1) was generated by feeding this entire file as a single --text argument; prepare_ct() has no concept of a blank line as a message separator (it silently skips ' ', '.', LF, CR like any other whitespace), so that fixture merged all three problems into one 565-character message and only ever exercised a single self-search pass -- it never covered the cross-message pairs captured here. expected_occurrences values were independently verified by compiling and running the current ComputeIsomorphCalculations.cpp directly (2026-07-06).
